compiled_state.title: GREEN: Add project-understanding.md generation to onboarding SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Add .claude/project-understanding.md generation to the onboarding SKILL.md — the lasting artifact that captures everything the conversation learned.

### Requirements:
1. Structured markdown with sections for stack, architecture, design summary, commands, infrastructure, CI, enforcement preferences
2. Human-readable and editable format
3. Clear attribution: detected (from project-detect.sh) vs user-stated (from conversation)
4. Generated at end of onboarding conversation

### Reference: Story description for template structure

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md (modify)
- .test-index (modify — remove RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh exits 0
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh
- [ ] SKILL.md references .claude/project-understanding.md
  Verify: grep -q '.claude/project-understanding.md' plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] Remove .test-index RED marker
  Verify: ! grep -q 'onboarding/SKILL.md.*\[test_project_understanding' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Checkpoint 2/6: Read SKILL.md. Phase 3 currently has 2 steps: present summary and offer /dso:architect-foundation. Will add artifact generation as a new step between or after these.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Checkpoint 3/6: No new tests to write — RED tests already exist in tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh (owned by d1bb-8d52). Proceeding to implement artifact generation in SKILL.md.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Checkpoint 4/6: Added Step 2 (artifact generation) to Phase 3 of SKILL.md. Includes: .claude/project-understanding.md template with all required sections (stack, architecture, design summary, commands, infrastructure, CI, enforcement), detected/user-stated attribution tags, and human-readable/editable format mentions. Renumbered offer step to Step 3.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Checkpoint 5/6: Tests run. All 4 target tests pass GREEN: test_project_understanding_output, test_understanding_sections, test_attribution_tagging, test_human_readable_format. 3 other failures (test_ticket_prefix_derivation, test_ci_workflow_examples, test_acli_auto_suggestion) are out of scope for this ticket.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Checkpoint 6/6: .test-index RED marker [test_project_understanding_output] confirmed absent (already removed or never set at this position — current marker is [test_config_generation_section] for a different story). All 4 target tests pass GREEN. Implementation complete.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: Added project-understanding.md generation to SKILL.md with structured sections, attribution, human-readable format
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
